ModMetaData.name: Ideology & Religion Rework
ModMetaData.author: skuffed
ModMetaData.description: Separates Ideologies from Religions in the Ideology DLC. When creating a new belief system, you now walk through a two-step wizard: first design your Religion (supernatural beliefs, deities, spiritual memes), then design your Ideology (social, political, and economic values). Both combine into a single integrated belief system.
